metadata.description: Batch 17 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1601-1700; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: having a husband or wife
words.definitionTh: แต่งงานแล้ว
words.example: They have been married for ten years.

words.definitionEn: to become the husband or wife of someone
words.example: They plan to marry next year.

words.definitionEn: a large amount or number; involving many people
words.definitionTh: มวล / จำนวนมาก
words.example: The camera detects a mass of material.

words.definitionEn: extremely large or serious
a skilled person; to learn something completely
words.definitionTh: ผู้เชี่ยวชาญ / ชำนาญ

words.definitionEn: a sports contest; to be the same or suitable
words.definitionTh: การแข่งขัน / เข้ากัน

words.definitionEn: having the same colour, pattern, or style
words.definitionTh: เข้าชุดกัน

words.definitionEn: a substance used to make something; relating to physical matter
the study of numbers, quantities, and shapes
words.definitionTh: คณิตศาสตร์

words.definitionEn: mathematics
words.definitionTh: คณิตศาสตร์

words.definitionEn: a subject or substance; to be important
words.definitionTh: เรื่อง / สสาร / สำคัญ

words.definitionEn: the greatest possible or allowed amount
words.example: The maximum pressure is five bar.

words.definitionEn: the fifth month of the year
used to show possibility or permission
words.definitionTh: อาจ / ได้รับอนุญาต

words.definitionEn: possibly
words.example: Maybe we should repeat the test.

words.definitionEn: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself as the object
food eaten at a particular time
words.example: We had a meal after the meeting.

words.definitionEn: to have a particular meaning or intend
words.definitionTh: หมายถึง / ตั้งใจ

words.definitionEn: the idea represented by a word, sign, or action
words.example: Check the meaning of the term.

words.definitionEn: a method or way of doing something
words.definitionTh: วิธี / หนทาง
words.example: Email is a common means of communication.

words.definitionEn: during the same period of time
words.definitionTh: ในขณะเดียวกัน
words.example: Meanwhile, the team checked the machine.

words.definitionEn: to find a size or amount; an action taken for a purpose
words.definitionTh: วัด / มาตรการ

words.definitionEn: the result or process of measuring
animal flesh eaten as food
words.definitionTh: เนื้อสัตว์

words.definitionEn: television, radio, newspapers, and online communication
relating to medicine or health care
words.definitionTh: ทางการแพทย์

words.definitionEn: a substance used to treat illness or the study of treatment
words.definitionTh: ยา / การแพทย์

words.definitionEn: between small and large; a means of communication
words.definitionTh: ปานกลาง / สื่อกลาง

words.definitionEn: to come together with someone
words.definitionTh: พบ / ประชุม
words.example: We will meet the supplier tomorrow.

words.definitionEn: an occasion when people come together to discuss something
to become or make liquid because of heat
a person or organization belonging to a group
words.example: Each team member signed the form.

words.definitionEn: the ability to remember or something remembered
words.example: The device stores data in memory.

words.definitionEn: relating to the mind
to refer to something briefly; a brief reference
a list of food choices or computer options
a dirty or untidy state; to make untidy
words.definitionTh: ความยุ่งเหยิง / ทำให้เลอะ

words.definitionEn: information sent to someone
a hard material such as iron or steel
words.example: The guard is made of metal.

words.definitionEn: a particular way of doing something
a unit of length equal to 100 centimetres
words.example: The cable is three metres long.

words.definitionEn: the central part or position
words.example: Place the sensor in the middle.

words.definitionEn: twelve o'clock at night
used to show possibility
not severe, strong, or extreme
words.definitionTh: อ่อน / ไม่รุนแรง

words.definitionEn: a unit of distance equal to about 1.6 kilometres
words.example: The town is one mile away.

words.definitionEn: relating to armed forces; the armed forces
words.definitionTh: ทางทหาร / กองทัพ
words.example: The site was once a military base.

words.definitionEn: a white liquid produced by mammals and used as food
words.example: Milk is stored in the tank.

words.definitionEn: the number 1,000,000
words.example: The project saved one million baht.

words.definitionEn: the part that thinks; to object or take care
words.definitionTh: จิตใจ / ใส่ใจ

words.definitionEn: belonging to the speaker
a place where minerals are taken from the ground
words.example: The coal mine closed last year.

words.definitionEn: a natural substance found in the earth
the smallest possible or allowed amount
words.example: The minimum temperature is two degrees.

words.definitionEn: a senior member of a government
small or less important
the smaller part of a group
a period of sixty seconds
a surface that reflects an image
to fail to hit, catch, attend, or notice
words.definitionTh: พลาด / คิดถึง
words.example: Do not miss the inspection step.

words.definitionEn: not present or unable to be found
an important task or purpose
words.example: Our mission is to improve safety.

words.definitionEn: an error; to understand someone or something incorrectly
words.definitionTh: ข้อผิดพลาด / เข้าใจผิด

words.definitionEn: to combine substances; a combination
words.definitionTh: ผสม / ส่วนผสม

words.definitionEn: consisting of different kinds combined together
a substance made by combining different things
able to move easily; a mobile phone
words.definitionTh: เคลื่อนที่ได้ / โทรศัพท์มือถือ
words.example: The team uses a mobile inspection unit.

words.definitionEn: a representation or type; to represent how something works
words.definitionTh: แบบจำลอง / สร้างแบบจำลอง

words.definitionEn: relating to the present time and recent methods
to change something slightly
words.definitionTh: แก้ไข / ดัดแปลง

words.definitionEn: a very short period of time
the day after Sunday and before Tuesday
what people use to buy goods and services
a screen or device; to watch and check over time
words.definitionTh: จอภาพ / เฝ้าติดตาม

words.definitionEn: an animal with a long tail that climbs trees
one of the twelve periods of a year
the way someone feels at a particular time
the natural object that moves around the earth
relating to right and wrong; a lesson about behaviour
words.definitionTh: ทางศีลธรรม / คติสอนใจ
words.example: The story has a clear moral.

words.definitionEn: a greater amount or number
the early part of the day
words.example: The inspection starts in the morning.

words.definitionEn: the greatest amount, number, or degree
words.definitionTh: มากที่สุด / ส่วนใหญ่

words.definitionEn: mainly or usually
a female parent
a machine that produces movement; relating to movement
words.definitionTh: มอเตอร์ / เกี่ยวกับการเคลื่อนไหว

words.definitionEn: a two-wheeled motor vehicle
words.definitionTh: รถจักรยานยนต์
words.example: He rides a motorcycle to work.

words.definitionEn: to fix something in position or climb onto something
words.definitionTh: ติดตั้ง / ขึ้น
words.example: Mount the camera above the line.

words.definitionEn: a very high area of land
a small animal or a computer pointing device
words.definitionTh: หนู / เมาส์
words.example: Click the icon with the mouse.

words.definitionEn: the opening in the face used for eating and speaking
to change position; an act of changing position
words.definitionTh: เคลื่อน / การเคลื่อนที่

words.definitionEn: the act or process of moving
words.definitionTh: การเคลื่อนไหว

words.definitionEn: a film
a large amount
words.example: The process does not use much water.

words.definitionEn: wet soft earth
words.example: The tyres were covered in mud.

words.definitionEn: many or involving several parts
words.definitionTh: หลาย / หลายส่วน

words.definitionEn: to calculate a number by another or increase greatly
words.definitionTh: คูณ / เพิ่มทวี

words.definitionEn: a mother
the unlawful killing of a person; to kill unlawfully
words.definitionTh: ฆาตกรรม / สังหาร

words.definitionEn: body tissue that produces movement
words.definitionTh: กล้ามเนื้อ
